chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-814 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 08.10.2025 Mr. Abdul Sattar Thaheem, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. The said cheques have been provided to the petitioner and counsel for the petitioner is present along with petitioner, he has also confirmed the contents and stated that total amount has been paid. Hence, in the circumstances, instant petition become infructuous same is hereby disposed of as infructuous. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
